/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/app/AppController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/core/protocol/TextProtocolCodec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/core/protocol/TextMessageParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/core/services/AcquisitionService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/core/services/ConnectionService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/core/services/ExportService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/core/services/PlotService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/core/services/ProtocolSessionService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/infrastructure/csv/CsvExporter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/infrastructure/logging/ConsoleLogger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/infrastructure/python/PythonPlotEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/infrastructure/serial/SerialPortStub.cpp.o CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/infrastructure/serial/PosixSerialPort.cpp.o CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/ui/viewmodels/MainViewModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/ui/BatViewApp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/ui/frames/MainFrame.cpp.o CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/ui/dialogs/ExportDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/ui/panels/ConnectionPanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/ui/panels/PlotPanel.cpp.o -o batView.app/Contents/MacOS/batView   -L/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -L/opt/homebrew/lib -framework IOKit -framework Carbon -framework Cocoa -framework QuartzCore -framework AudioToolbox -framework System -framework OpenGL -lwx_baseu-3.3 -lwx_osx_cocoau_core-3.3
